basic_details.job_title: MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 18 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) Upper Divisional Clerk Notification 2026 has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced through the MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: As per Mizoram Ministerial Service Rules, 2011 and 2021
qualification.details: From officers holding posts in LDC grade with 5 years regular service in the grade (MMS Rules, 2011) or 7 years regular service (MMS Rules, 2021)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MPSC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk recruitment is 24th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Upper Divisional Clerk post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 18 vacancies announced for the Upper Divisional Clerk post by the Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The qualification required is as per Mizoram Ministerial Service Rules, 2011 and 2021. Specifically, it's for officers holding posts in LDC grade with 5 years regular service in the grade (MMS Rules, 2011) or 7 years regular service (MMS Rules, 2021).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Upper Divisional Clerk position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Upper Divisional Clerk post will receive a salary as per Level 6 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk recruitment will be based on a Limited Departmental Examination.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the notification, Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempt from paying any application fee. Other categories' fee details should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link is provided.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the MPSC Upper Divisional Clerk recruitment is entirely online through the official MPSC website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The specific age limit details are not provided in the summary. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for precise age criteria and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Mizoram Public Service Commission?
faq.answer: The official website of the Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) is mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in, where you can find more information and apply.
